name: Autonomous AI Crawler
description: Uses Exa to search for pages matching a query, Firecrawl to scrape multiple pages for deep content, Claude AI to analyze and extract structured data, and posts a comprehensive report to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web search

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for scraping pages

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting results

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the crawl report

searchQuery.description: What to search for (e.g. 'social media profiles for tech companies')

extractionGoal.default: Extract all relevant structured data, contacts, links, and key information
extractionGoal.description: What specific data to extract from crawled pages

maxPages.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl (1-10)

steps.name: Search for relevant pages via Exa
Build Slack Block Kit crawl report
